name: Olive Cheese Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cheese and flour together.
2. Add the margarine and mix thoroughly. If the dough seems dry, work with your hands to incorporate it better.
3. Mold a teaspoon of dough around each olive, shaping into balls.
4. Place the balls 2 inches apart on a greased baking sheet.
5. Cover and chill for 1 hour.
6. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes. The cheese balls can be made ahead of time and stored in the refrigerator or frozen.
